description_long: This is a white picket garden gate set within a matching fence, featuring an arched trellis overhead and a swinging gate door. The gate is flanked by two short fence sections, one of which includes a black vertical segment and a mailbox attached to the left post. Three flat, irregularly shaped stepping stones are positioned in front of the gate, suggesting a pathway. Two small brown plant pots are placed near the right side of the gate, adding a decorative touch. The structure is primarily constructed from painted wood, with some metal components likely used for hinges and the mailbox. The overall design is classic and inviting, suitable for residential or park entrances.
description: A white picket garden gate with an arched trellis, flanked by short fence sections, a mailbox, and stepping stones in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched trellis, open gate, mailbox on the left, and three stepping stones leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the gate and fence, the mailbox protruding from the left post, and the alignment of the stepping stones.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open gate from behind, the two brown plant pots on the right, and the full span of the picket fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gate's hinges, the mailbox from a different angle, and the arrangement of the stepping stones.
attribute_surrounding_structure: painted wood picket fence with arched trellis and mailbox
